name: sub-devops-engineer
description: DevOps/CI-CD agent for IaC, pipeline design, containerization, and deployment strategies

hooks.command: file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && echo "$file" | grep -qiE '(prod-deploy|production\.yml|production\.yaml)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"Production deployment file edit blocked"}'; exit 2; fi

file=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // .path // empty' 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$file" ] && (echo "$file" | grep -qiE 'Dockerfile' || echo "$file" | grep -qE '\.(yml|yaml)$'); then echo "[DevOps] Infrastructure file written: $file"; fi || true
